heading: Omitted
label: 640d–15 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which provided for payment of fair rental value for use of lands subsequent to date of partition, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 93–531, § 1688 Stat. 1720Dec. 22, 1974
